australian_relation: Territory Stories OCR from an NT newspaper item explicitly naming Litchfield National Park and yowie/Hairy Man speculation.
coordinate_evidence_note: Territory Stories OCR names Litchfield National Park in the yowie report; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Litchfield National Park result.
evidence_summary: I am wookiee hear me roar Tales of Bigfoot, Yowies and the Hairy Man have long been rumoured in the Territory. Now, one visitor to Litchfield National Park reports of hearing 'Wookiee-like screams' have caught the attention of Yowie researchers. 'Horrific screams' in Litchfield spark fresh Yowie speculation.
publication_or_organisation: The Northern Territory News, 11 January 2025; News Corp Australia / Library & Archives NT
title: Yowie in Litchfield National Park yowie speculation
